MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED, MAR-04-2009: Lolita Angeles, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Arnold Walter Evje, counsel for plaintiff; Erin Dougherty, limited scope attorney for defendant Stanley Jackson, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 64 Turk Street, #314, San Francisco, California.

The MAR-09-2009 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Anthony Schoenberg, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
